summary: Verified About section layout-balance fix on desktop (1920x900) and mobile (414x900). All acceptance criteria met: two-column 5fr/7fr grid renders with items-stretch giving equal column heights (0px diff), no orphan block below the portrait, about-code-card is nested inside the right (narrative) column, portrait image loads (/assets/anil_professional.png, 1024x1024), all 4 highlight tiles render, mobile stacks vertically with no horizontal overflow, and no console errors. Sanity checks for nav, hero name, skills, and contact sections all pass.

issues: Left column has empty space (~270px) below the pills because items-stretch forces it to match the taller right column. Visually acceptable and intentional given lg:sticky/h-fit, but if a tighter look is desired consider items-start on the grid.

critical_code_review_comments: About.jsx grid uses items-stretch + lg:sticky lg:top-24 h-fit on the left card - works as intended (col heights equal) but the sticky+h-fit combination leaves visible whitespace under the pills on desktop. Consider items-start if a tight bottom is preferred.
Highlight tile testid generation via label.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z]/g,'-') produces correct ids (cloud-native, ci-cd, iac, automation) but is fragile to label edits - acceptable for now.
context_for_next_testing_agent: About section layout fix verified successfully. Desktop column height diff = 0px (items-stretch), code card x=881 sits clearly to the right of portrait (x=320,w=513). Mobile shows correct vertical stack (col2.y=2127 > col1.y+h=2087). No console errors. Skip retesting unless About.jsx changes.
rca of the issue: Previously the about.yaml card sat as an orphan below the portrait. Fix re-parented it into the right narrative column inside the lg:grid-cols-[5fr_7fr] container so it no longer hangs as a standalone stacked card. Verified via DOM children inspection: left column only contains [about-portrait, pills], right column contains [narrative, code-card, highlights].
